items.title: Roommates Season 1 Out on OTT: Know Where to Stream This Kannada Comedy Drama Series
items.summary: Written and directed by Darshan Shinde, Roommates Season 1 has finally arrived on Zee 5. The show explores themes of friendship, survival, and ego clashes.

items.title: Porn company fined £600,000 by Ofcom over age check failings
items.summary: Ofcom said Youngtek Solutions Ltd did not have checks between July and September 2025, but has since brought in verification.
